description: Add a post-disassembly LLM analysis layer that invokes Claude (Anthropic API) to analyze disassembled code and augment it with improved labels, inline comments, and high-level descriptions. Designed as a plugin consistent with existing formatter and CPU plugin architecture. Scope: Abstract LlmAnalyzer interface (src/analysis/llm/), ClaudeAnalyzer implementation using Anthropic Messages API via HTTP, LlmAnalyzerRegistry singleton matching FormatterRegistry pattern, CLI flag --llm-analyze [claude], integration point in main.cpp between label generation and formatting, HTTP via cpp-httplib + OpenSSL (FetchContent), structured output via tool_use (annotate_code tool), uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from environment, unit tests for interface and mock provider.
title: LLM Post-Disassembly Analysis Plugin

description:
Working directory: /Users/bryanw/Projects/Vintage/tools/sourcerer
Task packet: .ai/tasks/sourcerer-20260319155218-llm-data-analysis/

Extend the LLM post-disassembly analysis plugin (src/analysis/llm/) with two additional review passes:

1. DATA-AS-CODE DETECTION: Identify DATA-typed address regions that look like valid code sequences. Pass DATA blocks to the LLM alongside surrounding CODE context. LLM flags candidate regions with a 'reclassify_as_code' annotation. Apply by calling AddressMap::SetType(addr, AddressType::CODE) on confirmed candidates and re-running a disassembly pass.

2. BYTES-AS-STRINGS DETECTION: Scan DATA regions for runs of printable ASCII bytes (0x20-0x7E, 4+ consecutive). Pass candidate byte sequences to the LLM to confirm if they are human-readable strings. If confirmed, annotate with a 'string_data' comment and suggest using the assembler string directive (FCC/ASC/STR depending on formatter) instead of raw FCB/HEX bytes.

Both passes are additive to the existing Analyze() flow in ClaudeAnalyzer. They run after the existing instruction annotation pass. Results are written into AddressMap comments/types before the formatter runs.

See existing plugin: src/analysis/llm/claude_analyzer.h/.cpp, src/analysis/llm/llm_analyzer.h, src/core/address_map.h (AddressType::DATA, GetType, SetType), src/core/binary.h (GetPointer, size). Contract and plan should be created in task packet before implementation.
title: LLM Analysis: Data-as-Code and Bytes-as-Strings Detection
